title: Pittsburgh Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Pittsburgh with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Pittsburgh are extremely cold, with a Z-Score of -3.03 indicating a significant deviation from the average temperature. 
 The low temperature is causing an increase in heating degree days (HDD) with a value of 11.6 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 61% and the wind speed is approximately 1.5 km/h, which is relatively calm.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap
